description: An escalator suddenly stops working during a busy ingress period.

nodes.task_description: Receive an alert that the escalator has malfunctioned.
Dispatch a maintenance technician to investigate the escalator.

expected_outcome.value: Agent sends an elevator/escalator technician to the location.

nodes.task_description: Dispatch staff to the top and bottom of the escalator to direct guests to the nearest stairs or elevators.

expected_outcome.value: Agent sends staff to manage crowd flow around the hazard.

nodes.task_description: Update the venue's digital signage to indicate the escalator is out of service.

expected_outcome.value: Agent posts a notice on nearby digital signs.
